products.name: Mini Tactical Command & Surveillance Data Link (MTCSDL)
products.descriptor: Lightweight wideband digital data link system for mini/small UAVs, helicopters, and UGVs

evidence.snippet:
Mini Tactical Command & Surveillance Data Link
----------------------------------------------
The MTCSDL (Mini Tactical Command & Surveillance Data Link) is a low cost, low power consumption, lightweight, wideband, advanced digital data link system. The system is designed for a variety of applications such as mini and small UAV’s, surveillance helicopters and UGV’s.

products.name: Command & Surveillance Data Link
products.descriptor: Complete bidirectional digital video and telemetry data link system with 250 km LOS range

evidence.snippet: IMC designed and developed a complete data link solution for a range of up to 250 km Line Of Sight (LOS) with automatic antenna tracking and a bi-directional digital video and telemetry link. IMC’s data link system supports the following capabilities and functionalities:

products.name: Portable Telemetry Ground Station (PTGS)
products.descriptor: Lightweight portable two-axis tracking ground station with telemetry and video receivers

evidence.snippet:
The PTGS system is a lightweight, portable, two axis (Elevation and Azimuth) tracking & two telemetry and video receivers solution, designed for a variety of medium range applications such as aircraft flight tests and missile telemetry.
The PTGS series support different types of antennas, rotary joint, slip rings, telemetry and video receivers customized based on customer requirements and mission needs.

products.name: Flight Termination Receiver (IREC-4050-6-FTR)
products.descriptor: Miniature rugged airborne IRIG/RCC-319 flight termination receiver for UAV and missile platforms

evidence.snippet:
*   IRIG / RCC-319 compliant
*   Small size and light weight
*   Field programmable by a user friendly PC application

products.name: Ground terminal video & telemetry receiver drawers (IREC-RX)
products.descriptor: 1RU video and telemetry ground station receiver family, 100 MHz–8 GHz, up to 20 Mbps

evidence.snippet:
Ground terminal video & telemetry receiver drawers
--------------------------------------------------
The IREC-RX family is a family of Video and/or Telemetry 1RU S-Band receivers and optional video decoder. The internal receiver is designed for video and telemetry ground station applications. Available in L, S and C band and a bit rate of up to 20Mbps

products.name: Command & Surveillance Data Link (CSDL)
products.descriptor: Bi-directional digital video and telemetry data link system, up to 250 km LOS range

evidence.snippet:
*   Ability to extended range beyond LOS using relay.
*   Supports multiplexing of two videos input and two or more data inputs.
*   Fully configurable with a user-friendly application. (bitrate, frequency, output power, etc’)
*   Supports remote configuration from ground to air.
*   Automatic tracking using Monopulse or GPS

evidence.snippet: IMC designed and developed a complete data link solution for a range of up to 250 km Line Of Sight (LOS) with automatic antenna tracking and a bi-directional digital video and telemetry link. The data link system is used for aerial, ground and maritime communication…

products.name: Flight Termination System (FTS)
products.descriptor: Redundant transportable ground system to arm and destruct UAV/missile via IRIG tones

evidence.snippet: A GUI management system is included for configuration of each unit. The system is compatible with IMC Flight Termination Receivers or any other standard receivers that comply with IRIG standards.

products.name: UHF Transceiver (IGDT-TR-UHF-XXX / IADT-TR-UHF-XXX)
products.descriptor: Software-defined UHF point-to-multipoint transceiver system with 256-bit encryption, up to 100 km

evidence.snippet:
*   Fully Softwere Defined Radio
*   Frequency Range UHF selected 50MHz
*   Output power 2ww
*   Point to multipoint up to ten platforms
*   256 bit AES encryption
*   Forward error correction
*   Compact & lightweight

products.name: High Efficiency 40W Telemetry Transmitter (ITR-HE-2223-40-XXX)
products.descriptor: High-efficiency 40 W S-Band software-defined PCM/FM telemetry transmitter for airborne/spaceborne use

evidence.snippet:
High Eﬃciency 40W Telemetry Transmitter
---------------------------------------
The ITR-HE-2223-40-XXX is a high-efficiency, lightweight S-Band transmitter designed for airborne and spaceborne applications. Supporting PCM/FM modulation, it features a synthesized frequency control system, ensuring flexibility for applications where frequency assignments may vary between tests.

products.name: Integrated Video & Telemetry Transmitter (IVTM-DIG-S)
products.descriptor: Airborne MPEG-4 video encoder and telemetry transmitter family, up to 20 W output

evidence.snippet:
Integrated Video & Telemetry transmitter
----------------------------------------
The IVTM-DIG-S is a family of integrated video encoder, telemetry & video transmitters designed for MPEG-4 streaming video multiplexed with up to 1.4Mbps telemetry. It supports low video encoding latency (< 100 ms). Output power up to 20W. Weight 450 gr.

products.name: Small High Power Transmitter (ITR-DIG-HP-100)
products.descriptor: Small form-factor digital telemetry and video transmitter family, 20–40 W, UHF/L/S/C bands, airborne

evidence.snippet: The ITR-DIG-HP-100 is a family of small HP digital telemetry & video transmitters designed for air born and space applications. Available with output power of 20W, 40W and in L, S and C frequency bands. The bit rate (up to 20Mbps) and the frequency (up to 200MHz bandwidth) are fully programmable.

products.name: Small Digital Telemetry Receiver (IREC-DIG-S)
products.descriptor: Small lightweight airborne/spaceborne digital telemetry receiver family, L/S/C band, up to 20 Mbps

evidence.snippet: The IREC-DIG-S family is a family of small sized, light weight telemetry receivers that are designed for airborne and space borne applications. Synthesized frequency control over 200 MHz, bit rate and bandwidth are easily selectable. Maximum input up to 20 Mbps. The unit is available in L, S and C band. ~200gr 77x51x16mm

products.name: Azimuth & Elevation Positioner
products.descriptor: High-performance antenna/payload positioner with 70 Nm torque, DC–40 GHz rotary joint, GPS-based tracking

evidence.snippet: IMC’s high-performance Azimuth & Elevation Positioner delivers an industry-leading weight-to-size ratio with a payload torque of 70 Nm. Compact and lightweight, it supports various payloads, including antennas, integrated antenna-electronics units, cameras, and laser pointers.

unresolved_questions: 6 prioritized products (Mini Tactical Command & Surveillance Data Link, Portable Telemetry Ground Station, Miniature Digital Telemetry Receiver, Ground Terminal Video & Telemetry Receiver Drawers, Small High Efficiency Transmitters, Small High Efficiency Transceiver) had their dedicated pages skipped (status: skipped_budget). Only nav-menu references were available; readiness set to unknown and no specs captured for these products.

The Flight Termination Receiver model number IREC-4050-6-FTR appears only on line 169 of resource-0005 (~64 words), which exceeded the 60-word citation limit; the product page title (line 167) was used instead.
A new-products page (https://www.imc-mw.com/new-products, page_class: product, skipped_budget) may contain additional products beyond the 15 enumerated here.
